analysis.summary_en: Risk-off session in Taipei despite constructive overnight ADR action and positive Apple earnings. TAIEX -0.96% with TSMC -2.06% leading the drag, but the divergence vs TSM ADR (+0.57%) and EWT (+3.09%) is striking — local sellers are pricing something the offshore tape isn't. UMC (2303) bucked the trend on memory/legacy node optimism (SanDisk NAND, Macronix eMMC read-through). Foxconn (-2.44%) and ASE (-2.15%) weak despite Apple beat and ASX ADR up 2.68%, suggesting OpenAI capex doubt narrative is hitting AI server EMS names locally.
analysis.summary_zh: 台北今日呈現避險格局，儘管美股ADR與蘋果財報利多。加權指數跌0.96%，台積電-2.06%領跌，但與TSM ADR(+0.57%)及EWT(+3.09%)的背離極為明顯，顯示本地賣壓在反映海外盤未定價的因素。聯電(2303)逆勢上漲，受惠NAND/成熟製程利多(SanDisk、旺宏eMMC題材)。鴻海(-2.44%)、日月光(-2.15%)弱勢，與蘋果財報beat及ASX ADR +2.68%背離，疑似OpenAI資本支出疑慮衝擊本地AI伺服器代工股。

key_stories.headline_en: OpenAI demand doubts cast shadow over AI server supply chain (Quanta, Wistron, Foxconn)
key_stories.headline_zh: OpenAI需求疑慮籠罩AI伺服器供應鏈(廣達、緯創、鴻海)
key_stories.analysis_en: This is the cleanest explanation for why Foxconn (-2.44%), Quanta (-2.95%) and ASE (-2.15%) all sold off hard while their US-listed peers/customers were stable-to-up overnight. The market is rotating out of AI server EMS on capex-reassessment fears. However, Apple's strong fiscal 2Q with iPhone surge and China rebound directly contradicts the bear case for Foxconn — Foxconn's iPhone exposure is far larger than its OpenAI-server exposure. Likely overdone on Foxconn specifically; Quanta is more exposed to the actual server narrative.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 這是解釋鴻海(-2.44%)、廣達(-2.95%)、日月光(-2.15%)重挫而美股同業隔夜持平偏多的最合理原因——市場因資本支出重估疑慮輪出AI伺服器代工股。然而蘋果財報iPhone強勁、中國回溫，直接與鴻海空方論述矛盾，鴻海iPhone曝險遠大於OpenAI伺服器曝險。鴻海跌幅偏過頭；廣達才是真正受伺服器敘事影響的標的。

key_stories.headline_en: TSMC -2% on no local catalyst; ADR diverges +2.63%
key_stories.headline_zh: 台積電本地-2%但無在地利空，ADR背離達2.63%
key_stories.analysis_en: TSMC closed at the day's low (2135) on heavy 49M volume with no headline catalyst. ADR was +0.57% overnight, KLA results confirm AI process-control strength, Apple beat helps. The 2.63% divergence is unusual and suggests either (a) local profit-taking after recent run, (b) foreign institutional rebalancing on month-start, or (c) anticipatory selling on China geopolitical signal not yet visible in news. Watch for foreign net-sell data after close.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 台積電收最低點2135，成交4900萬張無明顯利空。ADR隔夜+0.57%，KLA財報確認AI製程控制需求強，蘋果財報beat。2.63%背離異常，可能為(a)近期漲多獲利了結、(b)月初外資調節、(c)尚未浮上檯面的兩岸地緣訊號預先反應。盤後關注外資買賣超數據。

key_stories.headline_en: UMC +3.76% on NAND/legacy strength read-through (SanDisk, Macronix eMMC)
key_stories.headline_zh: 聯電+3.76%受惠NAND/成熟製程題材(SanDisk、旺宏eMMC)
key_stories.analysis_en: UMC volume of 332M is enormous — clear institutional buying. SanDisk's long-term NAND supply deals and Macronix's 3,993% YoY eMMC surge signal mature-node and memory-adjacent foundry demand is real. UMC ADR was +2.43%, local outperformed at +3.76% — domestic flows leading. MLCC tightening (Samsung Electro-Mechanics +5-10% hike) also supports the legacy/specialty cycle thesis.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 聯電成交3.32億張為巨量，明顯法人買盤。SanDisk長約NAND及旺宏eMMC年增3,993%確認成熟製程與記憶體周邊代工需求真實存在。聯電ADR +2.43%、本地+3.76%領先，內資主導。三星電機MLCC調漲5-10%亦支持成熟/特殊製程循環論述。

key_stories.headline_en: ASE Technology -2.15% locally vs ASX ADR +2.68% — 4.83% divergence
key_stories.headline_zh: 日月光本地-2.15% vs ASX ADR +2.68%，背離4.83%
key_stories.analysis_en: Largest divergence in the table. ASE is heavily levered to advanced packaging (CoWoS-adjacent) which benefits directly from the AI chip squeeze theme. The local sell-off looks like sympathy with the EMS/AI-server complex rather than ASE-specific news. Mechanism: indiscriminate sector selling. If ADR holds gains tonight, expect mean reversion tomorrow.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 表中最大背離。日月光高度連動先進封裝(CoWoS週邊)，直接受惠AI晶片緊缺題材。本地賣壓看似伺服器代工/AI伺服器類股拖累的同情性殺盤，非個股利空。機制：類股無差別殺盤。若ADR今晚守住漲幅，明日有均值回歸機會。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Local weaker by 2.63%. Watch tomorrow's open — if no overnight China/geopolitical headline emerges, this likely closes. Falsifier: foreign net-sell prints heavy (>NT$30B) suggesting structural outflow.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 本地弱於ADR 2.63%。觀察明日開盤，若隔夜無中國/地緣利空浮現，缺口應收斂。否證條件：外資賣超超過300億暗示結構性資金外流。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Largest gap. Most actionable mean-reversion candidate if ADR holds tonight. Falsifier: ASX gives back gains in US session.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 最大缺口。若ASX今晚守穩，為最具操作性的均值回歸標的。否證條件：ASX美股盤吐回漲幅。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Largest raw divergence but smaller-cap, less liquid — confirm with volume before acting.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 原始背離最大但屬中小型股流動性較差，操作前須確認量能。

analysis.no_signals_note: Wife should note: the Foxconn/ASE/Quanta selling appears narrative-driven (OpenAI capex doubt) rather than fundamentals-driven. Apple results actively contradict the bear case for Foxconn specifically. Lower conviction on TSMC divergence — could be hidden foreign-flow signal, wait for chip data.
